label: Autoregressive decoding

node.label: Autoregressive decoding
node.definition: Outputs are generated step by step, conditioning each decision on prior outputs.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Autoregressive decoding is to connect Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Encoder–decoder transformers, Decoder-only causal transformers, Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning.
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: Autoregressive decoding uses Autoregressive / next-step prediction as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive decoding uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive decoding uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Outputs are generated step by step, conditioning each decision on prior outputs.

The role of Autoregressive decoding is to connect Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Encoder–decoder transformers, Decoder-only causal transformers, Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning.

Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Sequences, events & time series.
Autoregressive decoding uses Autoregressive / next-step prediction as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive decoding uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive decoding uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
